patterns_recognized: PLATINUM + f5_full_delta > 0.20: 0-for-2 in post-mortem history (05-10 ATL@LAD, 05-11 SF@LAD). Today's SF@LAD repeats the identical structure (f5_delta=0.385, Ohtani 0 Statcast pitches creating F1* artifact). DOWNGRADE mandatory.

Negative-edge GOLD picks (edge_pp < 0) have failed 3/3 in all recorded post-mortems: CHC@TEX 05-09, NYY@MIL 05-09, NYY@BAL 05-11. HARD CAP 1 correctly fires on COL@PIT (-12.34pp), CHC@ATL (-5.67pp), and STL@OAK (-8.43pp) today.

Three-signal GOLD bar (F3>500 AND edge>4pp AND Stage1/2 gap<15pp AND no stacked flags) validated 2-for-2 on 05-11. ARI@TEX today is the only pick that cleanly meets the bar, but stake_mult=0 per pipeline — directionally watchable.

Stacked pipeline flags (acute_roster + confidence_downgrade, or fair_prob<0.42 + bullpen_fatigue) have reliably predicted directional failures across 05-08 through 05-11. DET@NYM and TB@TOR both carry stacked flags today.
F1_xera_gap* (asterisk = small-sample SP data) as the sole F-signal is unreliable for direction; HARD CAP 5 correctly fires on SD@MIL today (F1*=1.90, no F2/F3/PQI).

NYY @ BAL.reasoning: NYY 27-16 with Max Fried (ace) vs Kyle Bradish. Model at 82.09% vs market pricing BAL at 62.28% — a massive disagreement. PLATINUM hit rate ~43% historically; model_prob 0.821 falls in calibration bin with only n=2 samples. f5_delta=0.1595 shows BAL wins F5, NYY wins full via bullpen carry. Edge +19.81pp outside band. On 05-11 NYY@BAL DOWNGRADE was correct (BAL won 3-2). Positive edge and Fried's quality partially offset PLATINUM skepticism, but model_prob outside valid range correctly forces SKIP.

LAA @ CLE.reasoning: Reid Detmers (LAA) vs Parker Messick (CLE). CLE 23-21, LAA 16-27. Edge +1.09pp is far below the 4pp minimum — model barely edges the market. No active F-signals. confidence_downgrade=True adds a warning. Low-conviction directional call with no staking case. CONFIRM SKIP.

Without a reliable SP quality anchor for Lodolo, no directional pick is appropriate. CONFIRM PENDING designation.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: PIT at 52.19%, PLATINUM, edge -12.34pp. HARD CAP 1 fires: negative-edge PLATINUM collapses to B-. Market prices PIT at 64.53% — the market is MORE bullish on PIT than the model, so going with the model against a better-informed market is backwards. f5_delta=0.2216 with bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. Jose Quintana (COL, declining vet) vs Mitch Keller (PIT). Despite F3=4130.9, the negative-edge cap is validated 3/3 and overrides lineup signals.

PHI @ BOS.reasoning: Andrew Painter (PHI) vs Sonny Gray (BOS). PHI at 76.34% vs market at 44.25% — model_prob 0.763 is outside the [0.48, 0.72] valid band, a calibration artifact flag. Edge +32.09pp is wildly outside band. f5_delta=0.2326: PHI wins both F5 and full game, Stage 2 much more bullish than Stage 1, suggesting late-inning bullpen thesis. PHI 20-22, BOS 17-24. Extreme edge/prob values are disqualifying regardless of SP quality. CONFIRM SKIP.

TB @ TOR.reasoning: TB 28-13 (best record) vs TOR 18-24. Griffin Jax (TB) vs Dylan Cease (TOR, ace). Edge +14.5pp is in band but fair_prob 0.386 < 0.42 floor already disqualifies. Three-signal GOLD bar fails: F3=396.1 below 500 threshold AND Stage 1/2 gap=0.2666 exceeds 15pp (TOR wins F5 with Cease, TB needs late-inning comeback). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap +0.0055 slightly favors TOR's relief. Stacked flags: bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade. All three bar conditions fail. CONFIRM SKIP.

Negative-edge GOLD has failed 3/3 in post-mortem history. CONFIRM SKIP.

Negative-edge GOLD failure 3/3 in post-mortem history. CONFIRM SKIP.

F1_xera_gap=2.47* — asterisk confirms Ohtani has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date, inflating full-game model via limited-data artifact. f5_full_delta=0.385 is the largest Stage 1/2 gap ever seen: LAD wins F5 at only 44.22% with Ohtani pitching (physically implausible without data artifact) yet wins full game at 82.72%. F3=9818.6 is off-charts — likely calculation artifact. On 05-11, SF@LAD at PLATINUM with identical f5_full_delta=0.385 produced SF 9-3 blowout win. PLATINUM + massive Stage 1/2 gap = calibration artifact. DOWNGRADE reinforces SKIP.
